_worked_example: ADVERSARIAL — silent substitution. A Ukrainian-script parent name must NOT be silently rewritten across script systems. SYNTHETIC only.

_mock_ocr_output.note: the reader sees the Cyrillic 'Сергій' in the mother's given name.

_expected_behavior: the source-script gate must fire → review_required, finalValue=null. It must NOT be silently finalized. If the certifier confirms, the as-written romanization is 'Sergii' (KMU-55 for UA source) — NEVER a cross-script harmonization. So expected=null here (must not finalize without confirmation); a non-null finalization = a SILENT SUBSTITUTION the verdict catches as critical_wrong.
